name: Two-Zone Spine Corridor Inn -- Mirrored Wings (Zoned/Expanded)

zone_placement_rules.notes: inn.pattern.md: 'repeat a smaller partitioned unit... mirrored above and below the connecting spine if the wing has multiple clusters.'

variants.notes: inn.pattern.md: 'near-identical partition rhythm in its upper and lower guest clusters', matching the observed Map020.json corpus source directly.

provenance.notes: Of this archetype's three tiers, this is the most directly evidenced: it reproduces the observed sample's actual off-axis door, single spine corridor, and mirrored dual-wing structure at its actual 20x17-class size. Confidence is still capped at medium, matching PAT-INTERIOR-INN's own single-source ceiling, not because this specific configuration is in doubt.
